name: cbit-career-agent
description: CBIT Personal AI Career Agent - AI-powered career assistance for CBIT students

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:worker"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && npm run build:worker
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:worker"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../worker && npm install && cd ../shared && npm install
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:worker

author: CBIT Career Agent Team
